testcase.name: should add a new element
should addAll elements
set should update an element
indexOf should return the index of an element
some should return true if at least one element matches the predicate
map should return an array of mapped values
remove should remove an element
includes should return true if the element is in the array
clear should remove all elements
should iterate over elements
set should add a new element and get should retrieve it
addNew should add a new element and return it, and allow subsequent update
set should update an existing element
has should return true if the key exists
delete should remove an element
clear should remove all elements
keys should return an iterator of keys
values should return an iterator of values
entries should return an iterator of [key, value] pairs
should iterate over [key, value] pairs using for...of
forEach should iterate over elements providing value, key, and map
should create a StringFacade instance
should compare two StringFacade instances
should not compare different StringFacade instances
should return the string representation of the backing object
should return false when comparing with null
should return true if the same instance is compared
should create a new configuration file
should load configuration successfully
should return deployments
should throw DeploymentNotFoundError if deployment is not found
should return the realm of a deployment
should return the shard of a deployment
should return -1 when the first number is less than the second
should return 1 when the first number is greater than the second
should return 0 when the numbers are equal
should return -1 when the first configSource ordinal is less than the second
should return 1 when the first configSource ordinal is greater than the second
should return 0 when the configSource ordinals are equal
should join paths and return the real path
should throw an error if the path does not exist
should securely join paths within the base directory
should throw SoloError for path traversal outside the base directory
should return the real path for an existing path
should throw an error for a non-existent path
should join paths and normalize the result
should resolve paths to an absolute path
should throw UnsupportedOperationError when instantiated
should return true for objects with a refresh method
should return false for objects without a refresh method
should return true for objects with a persist method
should return false for objects without a persist method
should return true for objects with a readObject method
should return false for objects without a readObject method
should parse valid JSON strings
should return the original string for invalid JSON
should merge two objects
should return the second object if the first is null
should return the first object if the second is null
should add missing properties to the first object and not delete the existing ones
should handle camelCase properties correctly
should throw UnsupportedOperationError when instantiated
should escape special regex characters
should return the same string if no special characters are present
should handle an empty string
should escape only special characters
should throw UnsupportedOperationError when instantiated
should return true for uppercase strings
should return false for lowercase strings
should return true for empty strings
should return false for non-empty strings
should return true for strings containing underscores
should return false for strings without underscores
should return true for strings containing dashes
should return false for strings without dashes
should capitalize the first letter of a string
should return an empty string if the input is empty
should lowercase the first letter of a string
should return an empty string if the input is empty
should convert kebab-case to camelCase
should return the original string if it is not kebab-case
should convert snake_case to camelCase
should return the original string if it is not snake_case
should convert snake_case to dot.case
should return the original string if it is not snake_case
should convert camelCase to kebab-case
should return the original string if it is not camelCase
should create a valid VersionRange with numeric bounds
should create a valid VersionRange with SemVer bounds
should throw a RangeError if begin is greater than or equal to end
should create a VersionRange from integer bounds
should throw a RangeError for invalid bounds
should create a VersionRange for a single integer version
should create a VersionRange from SemVer bounds
should throw a RangeError for invalid SemVer bounds
should create a VersionRange for all patch releases of a SemVer
should create a VersionRange for all minor and patch releases of a SemVer
should return true for equal VersionRanges
should return false for different VersionRanges
should return 0 for equal VersionRanges
should return -1 when the first range is less than the second
should return 1 when the first range is greater than the second
should return true if a version is within the range
should return false if a version is outside the range
should return the string representation of the range
should create a Version instance with a valid SemVer
should create a Version instance with a valid numeric version
should throw a RangeError for an invalid SemVer
should throw a RangeError for an invalid numeric version
should return true for equal SemVer versions
should return false for different SemVer versions
should return true for equal numeric versions
should return false for different numeric versions
should return 0 for equal SemVer versions
should return -1 when the first SemVer is less than the second
should return 1 when the first SemVer is greater than the second
should return 0 for equal numeric versions
should return -1 when the first numeric version is less than the second
should return 1 when the first numeric version is greater than the second
should return the string representation of a SemVer version
should return the string representation of a numeric version
should fail during invalid program check
should succeed during valid program check
getConfig tracks property usage
should return consensus nodes
should return contexts
should return clusters references

testcase.failure:
expected false to equal true
+ expected - actual
-false +true
AssertionError: expected false to equal true at <anonymous> (/home/runner/work/solo/solo/node_modules/chai-as-promised/lib/chai-as-promised.js:355:18) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:104:5) at async Context.<anonymous> (/home/runner/work/solo/solo/test/unit/core/package-downloader.test.ts:38:7)

should fail if source URL is missing
should fail if destination path is missing
